commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=522ce6917a25df5187701de5a3d029c7daf6fb23)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the ACP reply projector so `final_only` mode keeps buffered text across tool-use `done` events, and adds a projector regression test.

Reproducibility: yes. for the ACP-only subcase from source: current main flushes and resets the ACP projector on any `done`, and the supplied terminal proof shows the proposed ACP behavior. The linked Feishu issue is source-traceable to a separate streaming-card dispatcher, but I did not run live Feishu proof in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Maintainer or author scope choice is needed before automation: keep this as ACP-only without closing the Feishu issue, or expand it to the Feishu streaming-card path.

target.title: fix(acp): preserve final-only text across tool calls
target.author: cosmopolitan033

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
